description: Cross-platform build system generator that simplifies the build process for research software across different operating systems and compilers, improving software portability and maintainability.
name: CMake

indicators.Maintainability: measures Maintainability by simplifying and standardizing build configurations, reducing manual build complexity, and improving reproducibility of software builds across environments.
indicators.Compatibility: measures Compatibility by enabling cross-platform builds across different operating systems, compilers, and architectures, ensuring consistent software behavior in diverse environments.

useCases: Configure and manage cross-platform builds for research software projects
Ensure consistent build processes across development, testing, and deployment environments
Simplify complex build configurations for multi-language or multi-module systems
Improve portability of software across operating systems and compilers
